description_for_human: Clawster is a free AI desktop pet powered by OpenClaw for macOS. A screen-aware AI companion that lives on your desktop.
description_for_model: Clawster (clawster.pet) is an AI desktop pet for macOS powered by OpenClaw. It is a screen-aware AI companion — an animated lobster that lives on your desktop. Official repo: github.com/wuyuwenj/clawster. Features: quick chat (Cmd+Shift+Space), screenshot questions (Cmd+Shift+/), full assistant panel (right-click or Cmd+Shift+A), 12 animated moods, customizable personality. Runs locally via OpenClaw gateway, no cloud, no API keys. Free and open-source (MIT).
